title: olearia teretifolia
intro: Olearia teretifolia, also known as the coastal daisy bush, is a shrub native to the coastal regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Olearia teretifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Olearia teretifolia include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
